title: C-HQ Arcade
description: Explore the Command HQ arcade in 360 and move between connected points of interest.

title: The Retro Room
description: The Retro Room is Belfast's only vintage video arcade. A wide selection of 70s, 80s and 90s original arcade cabinets, tons of classic consoles with thousands of games, terrific and unique tabletop games and some oddities too.
